creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: bsam
Date: Wed Sep 19 14:42:54 2012
New Revision: 304530
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/304530

Log:
  Add trytond_calendar_todo 2.4.1, tryton Application Platform (Calendar
  Todo Module).
  
  PR:		ports/171497
  Submitted by:	matthias@petermann.it

Added:
  head/finance/trytond_calendar_todo/
  head/finance/trytond_calendar_todo/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_calendar_todo/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_calendar_todo/pkg-descr   (contents, props changed)
  head/finance/trytond_calendar_todo/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)
Modified:
  head/finance/Makefile

Modified: head/finance/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 14:41:45 2012	(r304529)
+++ head/finance/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 14:42:54 2012	(r304530)
@@ -120,6 +120,7 @@
     SUBDIR += trytond_calendar
     SUBDIR += trytond_calendar_classification
     SUBDIR += trytond_calendar_scheduling
+    SUBDIR += trytond_calendar_todo
     SUBDIR += trytond_carrier
     SUBDIR += trytond_carrier_percentage
     SUBDIR += trytond_carrier_weight

Added: head/finance/trytond_calendar_todo/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_calendar_todo/Makefile	Wed Sep 19 14:42:54 2012	(r304530)
@@ -0,0 +1,20 @@
+# Created by: Matthias Petermann<matthias@petermann.it>
+# $FreeBSD$
+
+PORTNAME=	trytond_calendar_todo
+PORTVERSION=	2.4.1
+CATEGORIES=	finance python
+MASTER_SITES=	http://downloads2.tryton.org/${PORTVERSION:R}/
+
+MAINTAINER=	matthias@petermann.it
+COMMENT=	Tryton Application Platform (Calendar Todo Module)
+
+LICENSE=	GPLv3
+
+RUN_DEPENDS=	trytond>=2.4.0:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond \
+		trytond_calendar>=2.4.1:${PORTSDIR}/finance/trytond_calendar
+
+USE_PYTHON=	yes
+USE_PYDISTUTILS=easy_install
+
+.include <bsd.port.mk>

Added: head/finance/trytond_calendar_todo/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_calendar_todo/distinfo	Wed Sep 19 14:42:54 2012	(r304530)
@@ -0,0 +1,2 @@
+SHA256 (trytond_calendar_todo-2.4.1.tar.gz) = eeb337049e2f59b8db644b5c4a106ba440f07af8714fca3fa1d125b6cbbb167d
+SIZE (trytond_calendar_todo-2.4.1.tar.gz) = 37114

Added: head/finance/trytond_calendar_todo/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- /dev/null	00:00:00 1970	(empty, because file is newly added)
+++ head/finance/trytond_calendar_todo/pkg-descr	Wed Sep 19 14:42:54 2012	(r304530)
@@ -0,0 +1,3 @@
+This port adds the Calendar Todo Module to the Tryton Application Platform.
+
+WWW: http://www.tryton.org/

Added: head/finance/trytond_calendar_todo/pkg-plist
